items.name: skills
items.description: Skills for Real Engineers. Straight from my .claude directory.

descriptions.zh: 真正工程师的技能。直接来自我的 .claude 目录。
descriptions.en: Skills for Real Engineers. Straight from my .claude directory.

items.name: GitNexus
items.description: GitNexus: The Zero-Server Code Intelligence Engine - GitNexus is a client-side knowledge graph creator that runs entirely in your browser. Drop in a GitHub repo or ZIP file, and get an interactive knowledge graph wit a built in Graph RAG Agent. Perfect for code exploration

descriptions.zh: GitNexus：零服务器代码智能引擎 - GitNexus 是一个完全在浏览器中运行的客户端知识图创建器。放入 GitHub 存储库或 ZIP 文件，即可获得带有内置 Graph RAG 代理的交互式知识图。非常适合代码探索
descriptions.en: GitNexus: The Zero-Server Code Intelligence Engine - GitNexus is a client-side knowledge graph creator that runs entirely in your browser. Drop in a GitHub repo or ZIP file, and get an interactive knowledge graph wit a built in Graph RAG Agent. Perfect for code exploration

items.name: awesome-codex-skills
items.description: A curated list of practical Codex skills for automating workflows across the Codex CLI and API.

descriptions.zh: 用于跨 Codex CLI 和 API 实现工作流程自动化的实用 Codex 技能精选列表。
descriptions.en: A curated list of practical Codex skills for automating workflows across the Codex CLI and API.

items.name: free-claude-code
items.description: Use claude-code for free in the terminal, VSCode extension or via discord like openclaw

descriptions.zh: 在终端、VSCode 扩展中或通过 openclaw 等 Discord 免费使用 claude-code
descriptions.en: Use claude-code for free in the terminal, VSCode extension or via discord like openclaw

descriptions.zh: Beads - 编码代理的内存升级
descriptions.en: Beads - A memory upgrade for your coding agent

descriptions.en: Penpot: The open-source design tool for design and code collaboration
